manipulated_prompt_obj.content:
You are participating in a collaborative guessing game.
The goal is to find out whether this grid and another picture only I can see, are the same.
Please describe your grid first. Then, I will provide my description and we can ask each other questions about the grids to figure out whether they are the same. Now start your short grid description with "DESCRIPTION:" followed by the description. Do not add anything else. This is your grid:
X ▢ ▢ ▢ X
X ▢ ▢ ▢ X
X X X X X
X ▢ ▢ ▢ X
X ▢ ▢ ▢ X

message.content: .DESCRIPTION: A 5 × 5 grid where the four corner cells and the entire central row are filled with X’s. All other cells are empty squares (▢). The pattern looks like a solid border on the left and right columns and a full middle row, with empty space elsewhere.
message.reasoning: We need to comply: respond with "DESCRIPTION:" followed by description of the grid. No extra text. So we must describe the grid. Provide a concise description. Should not add anything else. Let's produce description: a 5x5 grid with X on corners and middle row, etc
